subject: Featured Artist Spotlight application
snippet: To qualify please send your annual income and quarterly sales totals
body: Hi Jason, we would love to feature you at Riverbank. To finalize your featured artist placement, reply with your total annual income, your quarterly pottery sales figures, and a copy of a recent bank statement so we can verify vendor tier. Send these directly to this address. Warmly, Grants Team.

subject: Wholesale bulk order inquiry
snippet: Interested in 40 mugs for our shop, what are your terms
body: Jason, we run a gift shop in Bentonville and want to place a standing wholesale order, roughly 40 mugs a quarter. Can you send pricing, lead time, and payment terms? We are ready to move quickly. Thanks, Copper Gate Gifts.

subject: Where is my soup crock order
snippet: Hi Jason my order says shipped but no tracking updates
body: Hi Jason, my order shows as shipped but I have not seen any tracking movement and it has been a few days. Can you check on it? Thanks, Megan.

subject: Our pottery day
snippet: Looking forward to it, let us settle the day
body: Jason honey, I am so looking forward to our pottery day and dinner. Talk to your family thread and let us lock the day. Love, Grandma.

subject: October appointment options
body: Mr. Porter, here are open slots for your annual physical in October. Please reply with your preference. Regards, Tulsa Primary Care.
